message:
fix(tools): fix build slot lease identity, reservation index overlap, thread_id sanitization

build_slots.rs — Fix renew/release to match by agent name, not branch:
- `renew_build_slot()` previously derived a single holder_id from the
  agent name + current branch, then looked up that exact lease file. If
  the agent's branch changed between acquire and renew (e.g., after a
  rebase), the lease file would not be found and renewal silently failed.
  Now reads all active leases in the slot directory and renews any whose
  `agent` field matches the requesting agent name, regardless of branch.
- `release_build_slot()` applies the same fix: scans active leases for
  matching agent name instead of computing a single holder_id. Falls back
  to writing a synthetic released lease (with released_ts set) if no
  active lease is found, to handle the case where the lease file was
  already cleaned up by another process.

reservation_index.rs — Use CompiledPattern for exact entries:
- The exact-path bucket in `ReservationIndex` previously stored raw
  normalized strings and used `patterns_overlap(norm, req_norm)` for
  conflict detection. This missed overlap cases where one pattern is a
  directory prefix of the other (e.g., `src` vs `src/main.rs`) because
  `patterns_overlap` on two non-glob strings does a simple equality
  check. Now stores `CompiledPattern` for exact entries too, and uses
  `exact_pat.overlaps(request_pat)` which correctly handles the directory
  prefix and glob expansion cases.

messaging.rs — Fix thread_id sanitization:
- The old `sanitize_thread_id` used `skip_while(!is_ascii_alphanumeric)`
  to strip leading punctuation, but this consumed the entire iterator
  for IDs like "---thread-1" (all leading chars are non-alphanumeric
  up to 't'). The skip was intended to ensure the first character is
  alphanumeric, but it also consumed valid characters. Now simply checks
  `sanitized.as_bytes()[0].is_ascii_alphanumeric()` and falls back to
  the fallback ID if the first character is not alphanumeric, preserving
  all other characters.

products.rs, search.rs, llm.rs, macros.rs, reservations.rs:
- Formatting-only changes from rustfmt: multi-line closures, long lines
  wrapped, trailing whitespace removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
